query:
SELECT
            p.id,
            p.name,
            p.price,
            p.stock,
            p.category
        FROM products p
        WHERE 1 = 1
         AND p.category = NULL 
         AND p.price >= NULL 
         AND p.price <= NULL 
         AND p.stock > 0 
         ORDER BY p.id ASC 
         LIMIT NULL OFFSET NULL
